subject: WM-0072 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Confirmed WM-0072 adopts the reviewed WM-0071 future M5 prompt, preserves the M4 closeout baseline, limits edits to allowed planning/control-plane paths plus workflow inbox, and creates only proposed/unclaimed WM-0073 through WM-0083 M5 task packets. ADR-0010, scenario contract and roadmap plan cover anomaly roster, faction/governance facts, season/event pools, data-mod validation, focused save/replay, Worker projections, benchmark policy, owner-store boundaries and M6 stop signs. Required gates passed; ci:local used a temporary WM_ARTIFACT_DIR. Runtime M5 and M6 remain unstarted.
